name: CFmon.mcdSouth30
title: Downdraft Convective Mass Flux
description: Calculated as the convective mass flux divided by the area of the whole grid cell (not just the area of the cloud).
processing note:
Report on model half-levels (i.e., model layer bounds and not standard pressures).
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of CFmon.mcdSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
